title: Dominion Energy 2025 Annual Report

note: Company investor-relations hub used to anchor current public-company profile and reporting sources.

title: OpenEMS Documentation
note: Documentation for an open-source energy-management system relevant to distributed energy alternatives.

title: OpenEMS GitHub Repository

title: OpenADR Overview

title: Heat Pump Systems
note: Source for heat-pump electrification as a practical substitute for some gas heating loads.
